chapter_title.en: The Method of Ghusl for Janabah (ritual Bath for Sexual impurity)

text: 182 - وَ قَالَ: «إِنِّي أَكْرَهُ اَلْجَنَابَةَ حِينَ تَصْفَرُّ اَلشَّمْسُ وَ حِينَ تَطْلُعُ وَ هِيَ صَفْرَاءُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.182 - Imam (as) said: "'I dislike being in a state of janabah (ritual impurity) when the sun turns yellow (at sunset) and when it rises while it is yellow (sunrise)."
